name: Scheme Consideration
description: The government's committed benefit obligation per scheme application: agreed benefit type, amount, currency, and period. New in v2.1 — extracted from SchemeOrderAttributes.DisbursementRecord.
privacy_notes: sco:agreedAmount is the committed government benefit amount — not applicant PII but financial record.
Core Consideration fields (beckn:amount) may contain monetary values — treat per applicable financial data retention requirements.
